subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! From the moment of thy entry beneath His shade, thy labours and services in the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا منادی المیثاق زحمات و خدمات آن سرور ابرار در امرالله از بدو دخول در ظل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
